headline: Laimer Nears New Bayern Deal
body: Konrad Laimer is reportedly close to signing a new contract with FC Bayern, with the agreement in its final stages.
text:
🚨🔴⚪️ Konrad Laimer, set to sign new deal at FC Bayern soon as the agreement is at the final stages.

Small details being sorted then Laimer will be next one to put pen to paper, as Kicker reported.

Agreement imminent, almost done.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Laimer Nears New Bayern Deal

#FPLVortex #Transfers
